chapter_title.en: Among the Concise Words of the Messenger of Allah (peace Be Upon him)

text: 5870 - وَ رَوَى مُحَمَّدُ بْنُ أَبِي عُمَيْرٍ عَنْ عِيسَى اَلْفَرَّاءِ عَنْ عَبْدِ اَللَّهِ بْنِ أَبِي يَعْفُورٍ قَالَ سَمِعْتُ أَبَا عَبْدِ اَللَّهِ عَلَيْهِ اَلسَّلاَمُ يَقُولُ قَالَ أَبُو جَعْفَرٍ اَلْبَاقِرُ عَلَيْهِ اَلسَّلاَمُ : "مَنْ كَانَ ظَاهِرُهُ أَرْجَحَ مِنْ بَاطِنِهِ خَفَّ مِيزَانُهُ".

en.bab-ul-qaim-publications:
Hadith.5870 - Muhammad ibn Abi Umayr narrated from Isa Al-Farra', from Abdullah ibn Abi Yafur, who said: "I heard Abu Abdullah Imam Jafar ibn Muhammad Al-Sadiq (as), say that Abu Jafar Imam Muhammad ibn Ali Al-Baqir (as), said:
'Whoever's outward appearance outweighs his inward self, his scale (of deeds) will be light.'"
5871
5871 - وَ قَالَ رَسُولُ اَللَّهِ صَلَّى اَللَّهُ عَلَيْهِ وَ آلِهِ : "قَالَ اَللَّهُ عَزَّ وَ جَلَّ "إِذَا عَصَانِي مِنْ خَلْقِي مَنْ يَعْرِفُنِي سَلَّطْتُ عَلَيْهِ مِنْ خَلْقِي مَنْ لاَ يَعْرِفُنِي " ".
Hadith.5871 - Messenger of Allah (swt), peace and blessings be upon him and his family, said:
"Allah (swt), the Mighty and Majestic, said:
'When someone among My (swt) creation who knows Me (swt) proceeds to disobey Me (swt), I will set over him from My (swt) creation one who does not know Me (swt).'"
